title: Concordia High wins Knysna derby
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The soccer team of Concordia...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The soccer team of Concordia High School defeated Knysna High 1-0 in the Eden Region interschools competition on Saturday morning, 3 April, at Hornlee Stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The soccer team of Concordia High School defeated Knysna High 1-0 in the Eden Region interschools competition on Saturday morning, 3 April, at Hornlee Stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Aqhama Mdatyulwa netted the only goal of the game, sending his side to the next round of the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Concordia High's centre back, Lihlonele Mabhadi, gave an exceptional performance, marshalling his team from the back line.","html":"Concordia High's centre back, Lihlonele Mabhadi, gave an exceptional performance, marshalling his team from the back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking smart","html":"Looking smart"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The derby game started at fast pace with both schools grinding for their first goal.","html":"The derby game started at fast pace with both schools grinding for their first goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Concordia boys were looking very smart on the ball employing the pace of Aslin Kritzinger on attack.","html":"The Concordia boys were looking very smart on the ball employing the pace of Aslin Kritzinger on attack."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Concordia's Aqhama Mdatyulwa opened the score, making it 1-0 to put his side in the lead.","html":"Concordia's Aqhama Mdatyulwa opened the score, making it 1-0 to put his side in the lead."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Knysna High soccer team players were hunting for their first goal to level the score in the first half. Concordia were awarded a set piece outside the box, but the Knysna High goalkeeper made a brilliant save, denying Concordia their coveted second goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the whistle blew for the first half, Concordia was leading 1-0.","html":"When the whistle blew for the first half, Concordia was leading 1-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Balanced second half","html":"Balanced second half"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The teams played a fast but balanced second half, with Concordia pressing for more goals.","html":"The teams played a fast but balanced second half, with Concordia pressing for more goals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Concordia boys were dangerous on the ball, forcing Knysna High's defenders to panic, but Knysna managed to take control of the game toward the end of the second half.","html":"The Concordia boys were dangerous on the ball, forcing Knysna High's defenders to panic, but Knysna managed to take control of the game toward the end of the second half."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, it was too late for them to register a goal and the game ended 1-0, Concordia going straight to the next round.","html":"However, it was too late for them to register a goal and the game ended 1-0, Concordia going straight to the next round."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
